title: GSC Corrected Baseline (Jun 7, 2026) — Qasem's Manual GSC UI Check
source: GSC UI (manual check by Qasem) — NOT API

api_comparison.root_cause: GSC API strips anonymized low-volume queries. The UI includes ALL queries. API always underreports by 30-50% vs UI.

trust_hierarchy: GSC UI > API page aggregate > API query aggregate > cached files

previous_baselines.jun6: 311 imp (API), Qasem confirmed 311 from UI → API was closer that day
previous_baselines.jun7: 304 imp (API), Qasem confirms 436 from UI → 30% undercount today

mandatory_rules: ALWAYS present BOTH API and UI numbers side by side
NEVER claim API numbers are authoritative
ALWAYS use Qasem's UI numbers for business decisions
ALWAYS ask Qasem for manual UI check before reporting metrics
